title: The Broken Script: BLACKOUT - Quiet Mode
description: Lowers the volume of loud sounds in TBS: Blackout.
body:
This is a resource pack that makes it so the loud sounds in [The Broken Script: BLACKOUT](https://modrinth.com/mod/tbs_blackout) are MUCH quieter!

Some people don't like very loud noises, if you are one of those people this is for you! This resource pack turns down the volume about 50%!

**_This resource pack does not add any extra content, only sound decreasing._**
